📜 Privacy Policy

Effective: April 2026 | v4.1

1. Data Collection

ValeurFin collects ZERO data on any external server. All information is stored exclusively on your device using IndexedDB, localStorage, sessionStorage, and cookies as fallback.

2. Storage

Data is stored locally with quad-redundancy. No tracking, no third-party sharing.

3. Third-Party

MFAPI for fund search, Yahoo Finance for live prices (only stock symbols sent), TradingView widgets for market visualization. Optional: Gemini AI if user provides their own API key.

4. Deletion

Security → Wipe All Data to permanently delete.

5. Contact

[email protected]

⚖️ Terms of Use

Effective: April 2026 | v4.1

1. Nature

Educational wealth-planning tool. NOT investment advice.

2. Not Financial Advice

All projections are hypothetical. Past simulated performance ≠ future results.

3. Live Prices

Stock prices from third-party sources may be delayed. Not for trading decisions.

4. Responsibility

Users responsible for investment decisions. Consult SEBI-registered advisor.

5. Liability

No liability for financial losses or data loss.

Report includes: Net Worth Summary · Asset & Sector Allocation Charts · Net Worth Growth Chart · Wealth & Insurance Score Rings · All Holdings Table · Cash Flow · Tax Estimate · 5-Year Wealth Projection

📥 Import Data CSV

Import holdings from your broker. Existing investments are never modified — only new ones are added.

⚠️ Review the preview carefully before importing.

Supported: Zerodha · Groww · Angel One · Dhan · Upstox · ICICI Direct · HDFC Securities · 5Paisa · Motilal Oswal

How to export:
Zerodha: Console → Portfolio → Holdings → Download ↓
Groww: Stocks → Portfolio → Export → Download CSV
Angel One: Reports → Holdings → Export CSV
Dhan: Portfolio → Holdings → Export
Upstox: Portfolio → Holdings → Export CSV
ICICI Direct: Portfolio → My Holdings → Download
HDFC Sec: Portfolio → Holdings → Export to Excel
5Paisa: Portfolio → Holdings → Download
Motilal: Portfolio → Holdings → Export
SymbolNameQtyAvg PriceCurrentSectorStatus

Supported: Kuvera Portfolio CSV  ·  Groww Mutual Funds CSV

How to export:
Kuvera: Portfolio → Export → Download CSV
Groww: Mutual Funds → Portfolio → Export → Download CSV
Fund NameUnitsAvg NAVCurrent NAVValueStatus

ValeurBot

Financial assistant · 100% private

How Exit Signals Work

ValeurFin analyses each investment against objective rules. These are informational alerts — NOT buy or sell recommendations. Always consult a SEBI-registered advisor.

🟢 HOLD — No action needed
• XIRR/returns positive
• Performance ≥ 8% or your target
• No goal deadline within 6 months
🟡 REVIEW — Worth a closer look
• XIRR below 11% benchmark for 12+ months
• Value stagnant (<2% in 6+ months)
• Goal deadline within 6 months in risky asset
• LIC surrender value below premiums paid
🔴 EXIT CUE — Consider reassessing
• XIRR negative over 24+ months
• Down 25%+ from avg buy price, no recovery in 12 months
Does NOT consider: daily price swings, news, short-term losses
⚠️ Not financial advice.
